name: Brainrot Puzzle
author: Poki
description: Brainrot Puzzle is a trendy picture puzzle game where your goal is to solve quirky brainrot challenges and unlock the internet’s most iconic Italian Brainrot animal memes! Piece together puzzles to reveal characters like Ballerina Cappuccina, Tralalero Tralalá, Tung Tung Tung Sahur, Bombardiro Crocodilo, and more. Can you collect them all and embrace the chaos? How to play Brainrot Puzzle? Click and drag a puzzle piece, then drop it on top of another piece to switch their positions. Who created Brainrot Puzzle? Brainrot Puzzle is created by Playrea. Play their other games on Poki: Pocket Zoo and Guess the Emojis ! How can I play Brainrot Puzzle for free? You can play Brainrot Puzzle for free on Poki. Can I play Brainrot Puzzle on mobile devices and desktop? Brainrot Puzzle can be played on your computer and mobile devices like phones and tablets.
